revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]青野170 |位置 = {{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[事代主命]] |社格 = …」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]青野170 |位置 = {{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[事代主命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]青野（あおの）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の北西部、青野川上流の青野（あおの）地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''多祁伊志豆伎命神社'''（たけいしつきのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 たけしの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[事代主命]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようあおの}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

{{Infobox religious building | name = Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu) | native_name = 三島神社 (南伊豆町青野) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu) | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{Infobox religious building | name = Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu) | native_name = 三島神社 (南伊豆町青野) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu) | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Expand Japanese|三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)}}
{{Infobox religious building | name = Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu) | native_name = 三島神社 (南伊豆町青野) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu) | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.comment: 1 revision imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]青野170 |位置 = {{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[事代主命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]青野（あおの）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の北西部、青野川上流の青野（あおの）地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''多祁伊志豆伎命神社'''（たけいしつきのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 たけしの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[事代主命]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようあおの}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)]] to [[Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu)]] without leaving a redirect: Merging Japanese Wikipedia import with English content
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]青野170 |位置 = {{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[事代主命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]青野（あおの）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の北西部、青野川上流の青野（あおの）地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''多祁伊志豆伎命神社'''（たけいしつきのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 たけしの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[事代主命]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようあおの}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]青野170 |位置 = {{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[事代主命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]青野（あおの）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の北西部、青野川上流の青野（あおの）地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''多祁伊志豆伎命神社'''（たけいしつきのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 たけしの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[事代主命]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}青野170 |位置 = {{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|事代主命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}青野（あおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の北西部、青野川上流の青野（あおの）地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''多祁伊志豆伎命神社'''（たけいしつきのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 たけしの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * {{jalink|事代主命}}
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}青野（あおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北西部、青野川上流の青野（あおの）地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''多祁伊志豆伎命神社'''（たけいしつきのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 たけしの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|事代主命}}

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようあおの}}

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}青野（あおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北西部、青野川上流の青野（あおの）地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''多祁伊志豆伎命神社'''（たけいしつきのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 たけしの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|事代主命}}

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}青野（あおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北西部、青野川上流の青野（あおの）地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''多祁伊志豆伎命神社'''（たけいしつきのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 たけしの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|事代主命}}

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}青野（あおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北西部、青野川上流の青野（あおの）地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''多祁伊志豆伎命神社'''（たけいしつきのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 たけしの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|事代主命}}

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Aono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Aono district in the upper reaches of the Aono River, in northwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Aono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Aono district in the upper reaches of the Aono River, in northwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

{{DEFAULTSORT:??????? ???????????}}

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Aono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Aono district in the upper reaches of the Aono River, in northwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

{{DEFAULTSORT:??????? ???????????}}

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Aono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Aono district in the upper reaches of the Aono River, in northwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Aono district in the upper reaches of the Aono River, in northwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611}}

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Aono, Minamiizu)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町青野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== Japanese content == {{?? |?? = Mishima Shrine |?? = {{?????|cat=???}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}}} |??? = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}{{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}} Aono 170 |?? = {{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} |?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} candidate shrine |?? = |?? = |?? = |??? = |?? = November 2 |?? = |?? = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=????|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Aono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.
=== Overview === It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Aono district in the upper reaches of the Aono River, in northwestern Minamiizu.
Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.
=== Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}}
=== Notes === {{Reflist}}
=== External links === * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

== Japanese content == {{?? |?? = Mishima Shrine |?? = {{?????|cat=???}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}}} |??? = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}{{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}} Aono 170 |?? = {{coord|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} |?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} candidate shrine |?? = |?? = |?? = |??? = |?? = November 2 |?? = |?? = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=????|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|48.1|N|138|49|50.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Aono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.
=== Overview === It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Aono district in the upper reaches of the Aono River, in northwestern Minamiizu.
Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Overview === It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Aono district in the upper reaches of the Aono River, in northwestern Minamiizu.
Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Aono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Aono district in the upper reaches of the Aono River, in northwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Aono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401113 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Aono district in the upper reaches of the Aono River, in northwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} "Takeishitsuki-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Takeshi no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima5_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140123-04.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.
